channel.title: 2025s on Kotet's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in 2025s on Kotet's Personal Blog

item.title: Building a Free-to-Use Bot for Summarizing Ministry of Internal Affairs RSS Feeds in PDF Format
item.description: This article documents my experience creating the “Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications News & Updates AI Bot” (@micsummary@mastodon.kotet.jp). This Mastodon bot monitors the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications’ RSS feed for new announcements and automatically summarizes any attached PDF documents before posting them to Mastodon. For example, it generates posts like this one—a summary of a recent conference regarding undersea cable infrastructure that has

item.title: Using Open-Dubbing to Enjoy English Videos and Podcasts in Japanese
item.description: Overview I recently tried out Open-Dubbing, a tool that automatically generates Japanese voice-overs for videos. This article provides an overview of Open-Dubbing and explains how to use it, along with introducing a custom wrapper script I developed. While I was able to make it work in my environment, I’m still dissatisfied with its performance. I’ve also included audio samples from actual execution to demonstrate the user experience. Background For quite
